hero.headline: Learn at the speed of your curiosity
hero.subheadline: ZeroEka maps your knowledge, adapts to your pace, and builds your constellation of expertise — one insight at a time.

cards: Generic courses. Generic pace. Generic results.
You forget 70% of what you learned last week.
Learning apps built for engagement, not mastery.

howItWorks.headline: Your knowledge, visualised and growing
steps: Let the AI chart your path

q1.question: Is ZeroEka free to use?
q1.answer: Yes, we offer a generous free tier for individual learners.
